introTxt: Almost 5 years of commercial experience building frontend and full-stack applications mostly in React and Next.js, proven across diverse domains — from e-commerce and SaaS to cultural platforms. Owns projects end-to-end as a freelancer while collaborating effectively within cross-functional agency teams. Early adopter of AI technologies currently learning how to build applications with integrated LLM agents.

sections.text: A selection of recent work spanning e-commerce, fintech, and enterprise platforms — each built with a focus on performance, usability, and long-term maintainability.

cards.title: Discovery
cards.content: Every engagement starts with deep listening. We map stakeholder goals, audit existing systems, interview end users, and identify the friction points that matter most. The output is a shared understanding — not a 60-page document nobody reads, but a focused brief that drives every decision downstream.

cards.title: Design
cards.content: We design in the browser as much as in Figma. Interactive prototypes replace static mockups early, so everyone can feel the product before a single line of production code is written. Typography, spacing, motion — we sweat the details because users notice them, even when they can't articulate why.

cards.title: Engineering
cards.content: Our stack is modern but pragmatic: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, PostgreSQL. We pick tools that let us move fast without accumulating debt. Every component is built for reuse, every API contract is typed end-to-end, and every deploy goes through automated checks before reaching production.

quotes.quote: They didn't just deliver a website — they helped us rethink how we communicate with our customers. The new platform increased our conversion rate by 34% in the first quarter after launch. What impressed me most was their ability to challenge our assumptions constructively while still respecting our brand heritage.
quotes.name: Katarzyna Wiśniewska
quotes.title: Head of Digital, Europharma Group

quotes.quote: Working with this team felt like having an in-house product department. They were embedded in our workflow, attended our standups, and treated our deadlines as their own. The result speaks for itself — a platform that handles 50,000 daily active users without breaking a sweat, and a design system our internal team can actually maintain.
quotes.name: Michał Zieliński
quotes.title: CTO, FinBridge Technologies

sections.text: We are a compact studio of designers and engineers based in Kraków, Poland. Founded in 2018, we have partnered with startups, scale-ups, and enterprise teams across Europe to ship digital products that perform. Our work spans brand identities, marketing platforms, SaaS dashboards, and internal tools — always with an emphasis on clean code, thoughtful design, and measurable results. We keep our team small on purpose: every project gets senior attention from day one, and every client has a direct line to the people doing the work.
